=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 10/29/02, Ames, Iowa, 2CDR

Lineage: no info
Very good sound

CD1

1 intro + Seeing The Real You At Last (Bob on piano), 2 Ring Them Bells (Bob on piano and Larry on pedal steel), 3 Tombstone Blues (Bob on piano), 4 The End Of The Innocence (Song by Don Henley and Bruce Hornsby) (Bob on piano), 5 You Ain't Goin' Nowhere (Bob on piano and harp and Larry on pedal steel), 6 Brown Sugar (song by Mick Jagger and Keith Richards), 7 Tonight I'll Be Staying Here With You, (Bob on acoustic guitar, Larry on pedal steel, Larry on electric guitar & Tony on electric bass), 8 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic), (Bob on piano, Larry on cittern, Charlie on electric and Tony on standup bass), 9 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic), 10 The Wicked Messenger (Bob on harp), 11 My Back Pages (acoustic) (Larry on fiddle), 12 Old Man (acoustic) (Song by Neil Young), (Bob and Larry on acoustic guitars, Charlie on electric guitar and Tony on electric bass),

CD2

1 Honest With Me (Bob on piano and Larry on slide guitar), 2 The Times They Are A-Changin' (acoustic) (Larry on cittern and Charlie on electric guitar), 3 High Water (For Charley Patton) (Bob on piano), 4 Mutineer (Song by Warren Zevon) (Bob on piano and Larry on pedal steel), 5 Bye And Bye (Bob on piano and Tony on standup bass), 6 Summer Days (Tony on standup bass), 7 (encore), 8 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic), 9 All Along The Watchtower 



Concert # 1473 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 20 of the 2002 US Fall Tour. 2002 concert # 90.
Concert # 74 with the 13th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Charlie Sexton (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

8-9, 11, 12, 14, 19 acoustic with the band.
1-5, 8, 13, 15-17 Bob Dylan (piano).
2, 5, 16 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
8, 14 Larry Campbell (cittern).
10 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
11 Larry Campbell (fiddle).
13 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).
6, 12, 19 Larry Campbell & Charlie Sexton (backup vocals).

8 new songs (40%) compared to previous concert. 1 new song for this tour
